ec2.vpngatewayroutepropagation.RouteTabl.Docs: The ID of the route table. The routing table must be associated with the same VPC that the virtual private gateway is attached to.

ec2.vpngatewayroutepropagation.VpnGatewa.Docs: The ID of the virtual private gateway that is attached to a VPC. The virtual private gateway must be attached to the same VPC that the routing tables are associated with.
